title: AAOS M15 Track E4 Final-Completion Package

authorityBoundary.const: Track E4 evidence is non-authoritative. Only an explicitly approved human-reviewed merge of the exact frozen candidate may perform the M15 repository completion transition. Tag and GitHub Release publication remain separate human-controlled post-merge actions. Decision Proof sealing and Learning Proof sealing remain AAOS-owned; no evaluator may accept risk, close an audit, grant a waiver, or transfer authority.

runtimeBoundary.const: The Track E4 runtime evaluator accepts caller-supplied inert mappings only and performs no file, Git, GitHub, network, subprocess, command, digest, merge, issue-closure, tag, release, or external-state operation.

releaseBoundary.const: Human approval of the E4 repository transition does not authorize or perform v0.14.0 tag creation or GitHub Release publication.

approvalBoundary.const: Human approval of the E4 repository transition does not authorize or perform v0.14.0 tag creation or GitHub Release publication.

release_title.const: M15 Learning Sovereignty and Evidence-Bound Capability Memory

explicit_authority_scope.const: Approve merging only the exact reviewed E4 candidate and the linked repository M15 completion transition, including closure of #252 and #231; this does not authorize tag creation, GitHub Release publication, risk acceptance, audit closure, waiver, Decision Proof sealing, Learning Proof sealing, or authority transfer.

historicalArtifactAuthorityBoundary.const: Completion readiness is evidence for final human review only; it is not M15 completion, tracker #231 closure, README final-state authorization, release approval, tag authorization, GitHub Release authorization, Decision Proof sealing, Learning Proof sealing, deployment authorization, risk acceptance, rollback execution, deletion execution, fail-closed execution, audit closure, waiver, authority transfer, or final governance judgment.

prObservationBoundary.const: This commit-external observation records the frozen E4 candidate only; it is not human approval, merge authority, completion authority, tag authority, or GitHub Release authority.

verificationBoundary.const: Verification results are non-authoritative evidence only and do not approve M15 completion, a merge, tag creation, or GitHub Release publication.

explanation.const: Resolved by specific inert evidence; resolution grants no transition or publication authority.
Must be supplied and cross-bound before readiness; the requirement grants no authority.
